key.label: API Key

key.realKeyHint: For New API, viewing the real channel key itself requires 2FA. If the login and 2FA-assist fields are not filled in under Settings, this key cannot be read.

weight.hint: Controls load balancing within the same priority (0 = equal distribution)
weight.label: Weight
